headline: Universities’ dwindling financial positions place pressure on endowments
summary: The credit ratings of some elite US universities are slipping, as financial constraints hit schools at the top of the ratings scale. Endowment returns aren’t the primary driver of the credit rating downgrades seen in recent weeks, but their high exposure to illiquid assets could hurt their ability to supplement a school’s operating expenses at a time of increasing need. headline: Here's Why You Should Retain S&P Global Stock in Your Portfolio
summary: SPGI's subscription model, AI-powered offerings and steady segment growth support its outlook as recurring revenues remain resilient.
